mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOAN(LOAN_ID, MEMBER_ID, BOOK_ID) VALUES(#{loanId}, #{memberId}, #{bookId})
mapper.select: SELECT L.LOAN_ID, L.LOAN_DATE, L.DUE_DATE, L.RETURN_DATE, L.STATUS B.TILTE, B.AUTHOR FROM LOAN L INNER JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID = B.BOOK_ID WHERE MEMBER_ID =#{memberId}
SELECT L.LOAN_ID, L.LOAN_DATE, L.DUE_DATE, B.TITLE, M.MEMBER_ID, M.NAME, M.PHONE FROM LOAN L INNER JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID = B.BOOK_ID INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON L.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
